title: Quantization
summary: Representing neural network weights and activations using fewer bits, often for deployment on resource-constrained devices. It sits inside Model Optimization / Model Compression. Compare it with Model Quantization and weight quantization. It opens into NF4 quantization and fp16 quantization.

blocks.title: Compare and Contrast

panels.label: What it is
panels.body: Representing neural network weights and activations using fewer bits, often for deployment on resource-constrained devices.

panels.label: What it is not
panels.body: It is not just Model Quantization and weight quantization; the graph shows how it sits inside Model Optimization.

panels.label: Common confusion
panels.body: Ask how it differs from nearby concepts and what changes when the term is applied. Compare it against Model Quantization and weight quantization so the boundary stays visible instead of collapsing into a synonym pile.

panels.label: Best next step
